title: apowollastonia stirlingii subsp. stirlingii
intro: Apowollastonia stirlingii subsp. stirlingii, a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, is native to Australia and is also known as Stirling's apowollastonia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Apowollastonia stirlingii subsp. stirlingii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, but further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal treatment.
